name: GET /api/v1/health/ready
statusMessage: 1. Test Case ID: 4xn1sm  - Undocumented HTTP status code      Received: 400     Documented: 422, 429, 500, 204, 403, 503, 401  [400] Bad Request:  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H '0: ' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/ready  2. Test Case ID: UhETSm  - Accepted negative data      Allowed statuses: 400, 401, 403, 404, 422, 5xx  [204] No Content:  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H '0: ' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/ready  3. Test Case ID: Jsl3n4  - Authentication declared but not enforced for this operation      The API returned `204 No Content` for `GET /api/v1/health/ready` with invalid auth.  [204] No Content:  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/ready
